top_signals.title: SEC sues Texas man over $12.3 million alleged crypto scheme built on fake AI trading bots
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Neil Woodford criticises BP board for ousting ‘shouty’ chairman
top_signals.summary: Once-renowned investment manager Neil Woodford has criticised the BP board for ousting its ‘shouty’ chairman after less than a year in post. Woodford called out the oil giant’s board for removing Albert Manifold after just eight months in the job, noting that he is the third chairman the company has been through in three years, [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: Financial transaction control framework
top_signals.summary: The government’s approach to managing financial transactions under its fiscal framework.

top_signals.title: Transparency data: Government Major Projects Portfolio – Accounting Officer Assessments Ministry of Justice
top_signals.summary: Accounting officer assessment summaries for the Ministry of Justice (MOJ) programmes and projects in the Government Major Project Portfolio.

top_signals.title: Deep Sea Minerals to list on Nasdaq
top_signals.summary: The company currently has no active projects but aims to secure a portfolio of seabed mining concessions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Bloomberg This Weekend 5/30/2026
top_signals.summary: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by The Associated Press International Correspondent Philip Crowther, Fmr. CDC Director Dr. Tom Frieden, The New York Times Texas Bureau Chief David Goodman and Cisco President and Chief Product Officer Jeetu Patel. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Read-out of the College orientation debate on EU-China relations*
top_signals.summary: European Commission Read-out Brussels, 29 May 2026 Today's orientation debate gave the College of Commissioners an opportunity to take stock of EU-China relations — covering both the opportunities they present and the challenges they pose.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: DOJ seeks Judge Eleanor Ross recusal in Georgia election case, citing reports she was disciplined
top_signals.summary: The DOJ is suing Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensberger over his refusal to give the department election records.

top_signals.title: Glencore, Gentile back historical Irish region project sporting 3.3% zinc, 10% lead
top_signals.summary: Fueled by the C$12 million raised in March, Group Eleven has more than tripled the size of its planned drilling program for PG West.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Man sent to prison for selling data of 7 millions elderly Americans
top_signals.summary: A North Carolina man was sentenced to more than 10 years in prison for selling the personal information of over 7 million elderly Americans to Jamaican scammers. [...]
